# Attributions

This project references and builds on public SQL learning materials, standards, and engine documentation.

## Standards And Core References

- SQL standards documentation (ISO/ANSI references)
- Official database vendor docs (PostgreSQL, MySQL, SQL Server, SQLite)
- University course material (where licensed for educational reference)

## Attribution Principles

- Credit original authors and publishers
- Link to official sources whenever possible
- Do not copy copyrighted material without permission
- Prefer summaries, commentary, and original examples

## Adding New Sources

When adding a source, include:

- Title
- Author or organization
- URL
- Access date
- Short note on why it is useful
